_readme: Ratchet baseline for the conformance sweep (conformance.test.mjs). Every method here returns -32603 (internal crash) on well-formed minimal input — each is a REAL handler bug awaiting triage. Known failures are reported loudly but do not fail CI; any method NOT in this list that returns -32603 FAILS. When you fix one, the sweep logs 'FIXED — remove from baseline'; delete the entry (never let this list grow silently — that defeats the ratchet). The original 17 first-run entries (plus 5 more surfaced by the first RPC_SWEEP=all run) were all root-caused and fixed 2026-07-24: bug classes were nonexistent Collection.findAsync/.countAsync API calls (fix: find().fetchAsync() / find().countAsync()), Meteor-v3 Roles.userIsInRole sync calls (fix: userIsInRoleAsync), unwrapped fetch()/forge/XLSX/Assets raw throws (fix: map to Meteor.Error), a dead fetchCertificate import broken since initial commit (certificates.fetch now throws feature-disabled), and the udapCore.getCertificateIssuer stub returning an undefined variable. This list should stay empty.
